title: Animated Hotbar RGB
description: Enhance your Minecraft experience with sleek, color-cycling neon borders for your hotbar slots.
body:
## 🌟 Overview
Transform your Minecraft UI with a sleek, vibrant, and smoothly animated RGB effect! **Animated Hotbar RGB** adds a dynamic color-cycling border to every single slot of your hotbar, giving your game a modern "gamer" aesthetic.

## 📸 Screenshot
![Animated Hotbar RGB](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0598a1e7b571773798c39a65ed4274a9f8ace34e.jpeg)
## ✨ Features
* **Fluid Animation:** High-quality color transitions for a smooth visual experience.
* **Vibrant RGB:** Each hotbar slot features its own independent animated border.
* **Performance Friendly:** Optimized textures to ensure zero impact on your FPS.
* **Sleek Design:** Enhances the default UI without being distracting during gameplay.

## 🛠️ Compatibility
This resource pack is designed to be highly compatible:
* **Versions:** **Minecraft 1.21.x+**

## 📥 How to Install
1. Download the **Animated Hotbar RGB** zip file.
2. Open Minecraft and go to **Options** > **Resource Packs**.
3. Click **Open Pack Folder** and drop the zip file there.
4. Activate the pack in-game and enjoy!
